calendar.matters:
Verified Petition To Determin Validity Of Trust Provision And For Instruction
Off Calendar Sep-12-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that it is 10:05 a.m., that there is no appearance and took the Petition to Determine Validity of Trust Provision and for Instructions off calendar.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Aquino. (Not Reported)

Verified Petition To Determin Validity Of Trust Provision And For Instruction
Off Calendar May-23-2016 Continued To Sep-12-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Less for and with (petitioner) Leland Wong. Jon Vaught for (respondents) Cynthia Lee and Susan Lee.

The Court asked counsel if there is any basis to mediate. Mr. Less stated that he had suggested mediation but it had been refused. Mr. Vaught asked if they were going to mediate the issue of who the trustee is, that he guesses they could and that it is a procedural issue. The Court asked the parties where they stand with the resignation. Mr. Less stated that Alan Wong wants to continue to reside in the property after it is sold, that it will trigger rent control issues and that they feel he should vacate the residence. Mr. Vaught stated that that is certainly an issue for mediation. The Court set a deadline for mediation on August 31, 2016 and asked if there were any further dates to set. Mr. Less stated that the last issue is that the probate examiner stated that the contingent beneficiaries need to be given proper notice and cited 15804(a)(2) and stated that they do not have to be served. Mr. Vaught stated that he does not care. Mr. Less stated that it was the children of the beneficiaries and the he does not have their addresses. The Court stated that it will look into the issue a bit more. The verified petition to determine validity of trust provision and for instruction was continued to September 12, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Nancy Wong. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
